raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California State Assembly approved legislation to create six innovative Community Paramedicine and Alternate Destination programs.",
    "AB 3115 allows local EMS agencies to develop programs that are proven to increase access to healthcare and improve patient outcomes.",
    "Post-discharge, short-term follow up for patients recently discharged from a hospital due to a chronic condition is one component of the program.",
    "Case management for frequent 9-1-1 callers is included in the Community Paramedicine program.",
    "The program allows for alternate destination transport to mental health facilities.",
    "The program permits alternate destination transport to sobering centers.",
    "Directly observed therapy for tuberculosis is part of the community paramedicine initiatives.",
    "Hospice care is included in the authorized programs.",
    "Evaluations of existing Community Paramedicine pilot programs show that these programs improve coordination amongst health systems.",
    "Community Paramedicine programs reduce ambulance transports and emergency department use.",
    "Existing Community Paramedicine pilot programs demonstrate improved patient outcomes without displacing health professionals."
  ]
}
```
